title: Review
subtitle: Configure how Deep Review and /DeepReview assemble reviewers, apply strategy depth, and finish with a quality gate.

overview.title: Review workflow
overview.description: Deep Review runs a read-only reviewer lineup in parallel, then asks the quality inspector to merge and validate the final report.

command.title: /DeepReview entry
command.description: The command uses these settings whenever a chat session launches the full code review team.

reviewers.title: Reviewer lineup
reviewers.description: Locked core reviewers cover business logic, performance, security, and final quality inspection; eligible read-only Sub-Agents can join as specialists.

qualityGate.title: Quality gate
qualityGate.description: Timeouts, file splitting, strategy depth, and model choices shape how much work each reviewer can do before the result is summarized.

strategy.title: Review strategy
strategy.description: Choose the default depth for the whole code review team.

normal.label: Normal
normal.summary: Balanced review depth for day-to-day code review.

deep.label: Deep
deep.summary: Thorough multi-pass review for risky changes.

execution.title: Execution policy
execution.description: Control reviewer timeouts and how large scopes split across parallel reviewer instances.
execution.reviewerTimeoutDesc: Per-reviewer timeout in seconds. Set 0 to disable the cap.
execution.judgeTimeoutDesc: Quality-gate timeout in seconds. Set 0 to disable the cap.
execution.fileSplitThresholdDesc: Split each reviewer role when the target file count exceeds this value.
execution.maxSameRoleInstancesDesc: Maximum parallel instances for one reviewer role.

members.title: Reviewers
members.description: Adjust reviewer strategy and model assignment. Core roles stay locked.

extra.title: Extra Review Sub-Agents
extra.description: Only Sub-Agents marked Review and kept read-only can join the review team.
extra.hint: Create or edit a Sub-Agent, enable Review, and keep it read-only to make it available here.
extra.empty: No eligible Review Sub-Agents are available.
